description_long: This is a round wall clock crafted from a repurposed vinyl record, featuring a striking black-and-white stencil-style portrait of Che Guevara on its face. The clock face is decorated with bold diagonal stripes and a large white star, creating a visually dynamic and iconic design. The center of the clock retains the original red record label, which is partially visible behind the gold-colored clock hands. The clock mechanism is mounted at the back, with a small black housing protruding slightly from the rear surface. The hands are slender and metallic, with a classic three-hand configuration for hours, minutes, and seconds. The overall aesthetic is bold and urban, making it a statement piece suitable for contemporary or eclectic environments.
description: A round wall clock made from a vinyl record, featuring a black-and-white Che Guevara portrait, bold stripes, a star, and gold clock hands.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full Che Guevara portrait, white star, diagonal stripes, and all three gold clock hands.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the clock's thin vinyl record body and the protruding black clock mechanism at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the vinyl record, the red record label, and the black clock mechanism housing.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slimness of the clock and the clock mechanism's depth.
attribute_face_design: Round face with a black-and-white Che Guevara portrait, bold diagonal stripes, a large white star, and a visible red record label at the center.
